programme.title: E108 - Zero Day: Part One
programme.desc: Lois meets her journalism idol, Vicki Vale – only for Vicki to make Lois question her loyalty to Superman. Meanwhile, Superman hunts down Task Force X while dealing with a new power!

programme.title: E2 - Just Set Up The Chairs/Temp Check/Skips Strikes/Skips' Stress/Paint Job
programme.desc: While preparing for a birthday party, Mordecai and Rigby are assigned to set up chairs. They try to prove to Benson they are not slackers, but fail.

programme.title: E115 - Wing Nuts/Cat Dance Fever/Hunger Games/Hair Today, Gone Tomorrow/Missing In Traction/
programme.desc: After another destructive bout of cat and mouse Hildie and Beatie decide that Tom’s bad cat-titude has caused nothing but trouble around the cottage.

programme.title: E1319 - Feed Me/Crab Shenanigans
programme.desc: The Titans release a small marshmallow ducky that the Easter Bunny had locked up, not knowing the danger they have unleashed.

programme.title: E4 - Fix That Tape/Skips' Luau
programme.desc: A broken VHS tape needs to be fixed.

programme.title: E63 - Road Trip/Charlie's Big Foot
programme.desc: Chloe and the Bears take a road trip to see a meteor shower. Ice Bear, the only one licensed to drive, is put in charge, which becomes harder than he thought.

programme.title: E4 - Fix That Tape/Skips' Luau
programme.desc: A broken VHS tape needs to be fixed.

programme.title: E103 - The Distance/The Thing
programme.desc: Gumball must find a way to save his relationship with Darwin after the boys are forced to live in separate rooms.

programme.title: E7 - Litterbug/Rat Trap
programme.desc: Mr Bean is tired of litterbugs and attempts to clean up the whole town himself…with disastrous results.

programme.title: E8 - Kick the Bucket-List
programme.desc: For a thrill-seeking grandfather of two, there’s no such thing as retiring from life, but leave it to Bear Grylls to surprise even the most experienced adventurer. Together, they go full throttle to fulfill Art’s bucket list and capture a story worth telling his grandson back home.

programme.title: E2 - Wild Turkey, Ramps & Fiddleheads
programme.desc: Daniel takes on the challenge of turkey hunting and learns the traditions of foraging fiddleheads and leaks with Avani, Arthur and Sara.

programme.title: E9 - Later, Alligator
programme.desc: Billy and Terry help a homeowner with an unwanted reptilian guest in her pool. Then Billy gets hot under the collar in a house infested with bedbugs.

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: When Dick Cabela founded “Cabela’s”, he was unaware that it was to become the foremost outfitting store in the world. So it is fitting that his son is on a quest to explore the Hard Truths of conservation. Join Dan Cabela on this high-impact journey of discovery as he uncovers some of lesser known facts in the conservation world. In particular, the role that hunting and the utilization of wildlife can play as a modern day conservation tool.

programme.title: E9 - The Tadpole Badge
programme.desc: Duggee has made a beautiful rock pool. The Squirrels spot the strangest things - dots with tails, wriggling around. What on earth are they? They are baby frogs - tadpoles!

programme.title: E11 - The Pottery Badge
programme.desc: Duggee is having a lovely cup of tea in his favourite cup when Roly surprises him with a very loud peek-a-boo! It is so loud that Duggee jumps and drops his cup which shatters into pieces.

programme.title: E13 - Master Of Puppets
programme.desc: At Squirrel Club, there's a story told in blocks, the tale of a first tooth, a fable about changing emotions, and a yarn involving the Squirrels as puppets.

programme.title: E14 - Night And Day
programme.desc: Have you ever wondered what goes on at the Squirrel Club when the sun goes down?

programme.title: E15 - Say Cheese
programme.desc: The Squirrels learn about butterflies and tortoises.

programme.title: E16 - Eugene's Animal Chorus
programme.desc: Eugene gives an unexpected performance with help from some talented animals! Mooo!

programme.title: E31 - Work
programme.desc: In a game of 'Work', Dad hires Bluey and Bingo at his drainpipe factory. But when Bluey takes charge, Dad finds his new boss pretty tough, especially her no dancing rule.

programme.title: E33 - Trampoline
programme.desc: When Dad has to stop having fun with the girls and go to work, Bluey and Bingo scramble to keep him playing games with them on the trampoline!

programme.title: E34 - The Dump
programme.desc: On a trip to the Dump, Dad claims he's the best at everything. But Bluey discovers that Dad's throwing out her old drawing and questions if he really is the best Dad in the world.

programme.title: E9 - Barbary Macaques
programme.desc: Andy, Jen and Scout head off on a global adventure to the rock of Gibraltar, in Europe, to count all the barbary macaques that live there.

programme.title: E9 - Barbary Macaques
programme.desc: Andy, Jen and Scout head off on a global adventure to the rock of Gibraltar, in Europe, to count all the barbary macaques that live there.

programme.title: E18 - The In Charge Badge
programme.desc: What are the rules about being in charge? Make a plan, keep everyone happy, make decisions, lead by example and listen. Roly takes that one so seriously he gets a bit overwhelmed.

programme.desc: Loveable Duggee and the Squirrels return with more educational fun.

programme.desc: Mojo and Bo have to make sure Dot doesn't see her present before her birthday party. But that's easier said than done when Dot becomes an unstoppable present-hunting machine.

programme.desc: Raul, the Brazilian tank engine, wants to beat Thomas in a game. But Raul's super-competitive nature soon gets him into trouble.

programme.title: E10 - Dot Pursuit
programme.desc: Mojo and Bo have to make sure Dot doesn't see her present before her birthday party. But that's easier said than done when Dot becomes an unstoppable present-hunting machine.

programme.title: E25 - Aargh! Jelly!
programme.desc: Broccoli shows Supertato her latest art exhibition of jelly sculptures, but jelly is Supertato's secret fear. When Evil Pea finds out, she comes up with an evil idea to beat him.

programme.title: E11 - The Pottery Badge
programme.desc: Duggee is having a lovely cup of tea in his favourite cup when Roly surprises him with a very loud peek-a-boo! It is so loud that Duggee jumps and drops his cup which shatters into pieces.

programme.title: E14 - Night And Day
programme.desc: Have you ever wondered what goes on at the Squirrel Club when the sun goes down?

programme.title: E15 - Say Cheese
programme.desc: The Squirrels learn about butterflies and tortoises.

programme.title: E16 - Eugene's Animal Chorus
programme.desc: Eugene gives an unexpected performance with help from some talented animals! Mooo!

programme.title: E17 - Copy The King
programme.desc: The Squirrels play Copy the King!

programme.title: E33 - Trampoline
programme.desc: When Dad has to stop having fun with the girls and go to work, Bluey and Bingo scramble to keep him playing games with them on the trampoline!

programme.title: E34 - The Dump
programme.desc: On a trip to the Dump, Dad claims he's the best at everything. But Bluey discovers that Dad's throwing out her old drawing and questions if he really is the best Dad in the world.

programme.title: E10 - Blue Eyed Black Lemurs
programme.desc: Andy, Jen and Scout head to the island of Madagascar, off the coast of Southern Africa, to find out how blue-eyed black lemurs deal with itchy bugs.

programme.title: TV Patrol Sabado[Live]
programme.desc: ABS-CBN's flagship newscast and the country's leading news program in the past two decades, anchored by the most celebrated news team ever assembled in the history of Philippine broadcasting.

programme.title: Eastwood & Bronson[Live]
programme.desc: A comedic action parody about two bumbling detectives modeled after Clint Eastwood and Charles Bronson. As they investigate crimes, they stumble through absurd situations and chase criminals in a mix of slapstick humor and spoofed action tropes.

programme.title: Citizen Pinoy
programme.desc: Filipinos around the world hope to immigrate to the US, legalize their status in the US, or be reunited with their family in the US after years of separation. In this public service program, Attorney Michael J Gurfinkel explains, in plain English, the intricacies of US immigration laws and procedures, as well as advises of avenues to immigrate and developments in US immigration laws. Just because you're half a world away from home, you can still get answers to your US immigration questions.

programme.title: Bro. Eddie Classics
programme.desc: the flagship TV program of the Jesus Is Lord Church, is dedicated to fulfil its mandate of bringing all peoples to the Kingdom of the Living God through the saving, healing, delivering and transforming power of the Lord Jesus Christ.

programme.title: Kapamilya Journeys Of Hope With Fr. Tito Caluag
programme.desc: Kapamilya Journeys of Hope with Fr. Tito Caluag reflects on hope and the journey in finding and fulfilling the mission of God for them.

programme.title: Home Away From Home S5
programme.desc: a travel & lifestyle show that celebrates Filipino stories abroad as it chronicles Filipino communities all over the world and explores cultural exchanges of Pinoys in their home away from home.

programme.title: Tulong Ko, Pasa Mo
programme.desc: Tulong Ko Pasa Mo is a motivational and inspirational show hosted by Vic and Avelynn Garcia.

programme.title: Tunay Na Buhay

programme.title: E6 - Magic, A Blob, A Show & A Bubble!
programme.desc: Join Bubbles for a day of magic, a blob, a show & a bubble! First, Bubbles is excited to watch Pogo's magic show, but her curiosity gets the better of her & she spoils his tricks! Then, she invents a brand new bouncy blob, but it bounces out of control & causes havoc all over the Bodpod! The adventures continue as Bubbles gets stage fright before a big show & tries her best to stop a giant, beautiful bubble from popping.

programme.title: E3 - What Will Cody Do Today?
programme.desc: What will Cody do today? Every day is a new adventure! He might move to a new house with his family & cat, Pickles. Or maybe he'll find a simple empty cardboard box & use his imagination to turn it into a turtle shell, a drum & a race car! He could go on a hike with JJ & race walnut sailboats, or stay home & sing the ABCs over a big pot of alphabet soup. With Cody, you never know what fun you'll have!

programme.title: E1 - Awesome Animal Facts!
programme.desc: Blippi is learning awesome facts about all kinds of animals! He & D.BO travel back in time to meet the biggest dinosaurs, like the Argentinosaurus, & even try to keep a T-Rex as a pet for a day! Back in the present, they shrink down to count a shark's teeth with a pilot fish dentist. The adventure continues as Blippi learns how elephants use their trunks to keep cool & discovers why cats have whiskers from a local feline celebrity.

programme.title: E2 - Learning Fun at Home & School!
programme.desc: It's a day of learning fun at home & school! First, Mom & Dad put together a road in their backyard so the kids can learn about road safety while driving their toy cars. Then, it's time for a snack as Baby John learns his ABCs with Mom & Dad as they enjoy a delicious bowl of alphabet cereal! The learning continues at school, where the kids learn their body parts, see what's for lunch & learn how to play nicely with their friends.

programme.title: E2 - Causing Chaos All Over Town!
programme.desc: Arpo & Baby Daniel are causing chaos all over town! The adventure starts at the supermarket when Daniel runs off with a giant lollipop, leading to a wild chase with Arpo's rockets on the fritz. Then, a relaxing fishing picnic turns into a wilderness survival test when a thieving squirrel tries to steal their food! Plus, the family gets a mischievous new puppy that Arpo has to keep from making messes & a stroller goes on the loose, forcing Arpo to chase it through town!

programme.title: E1 - Learning to Do the Right Thing!
programme.desc: Join Buster as he learns to do the right thing! When Buster accidentally breaks the class flower, he panics & tries to cover it up, but soon learns that telling the truth is always the best thing to do. Then, when he & Daddy spot a steam train speeding out of control, they know they have to do the right thing! They race after the train & save the day! From cleaning up his toys to helping a puppy, Buster is always trying to do the right thing.

programme.title: E3 - Gentle Lessons & Bedtime
programme.desc: Join Twinkle for some gentle lessons & soothing bedtime songs. First, Twinkle learns about the importance of eating healthy, delicious fruit, like bananas, oranges & grapes. Then, help her find Sandy the Seagull while learning what sounds a pig, duck & cow make! After a long day of learning, it's time to get ready for bed. Listen as Twinkle & Mr. Moon sing a soothing nighttime lullaby to help you relax & drift off to sleep.

programme.title: E6 - Calm Songs & Sweet Dreams!
programme.desc: Join Twinkle for some fun adventures & sleepy songs! First, help Twinkle find Sandy the Seagull while learning what sounds a pig, duck & cow make along the way! Then, Bunny leads Twinkle on an exciting adventure into the forest to find a mysterious box. After a long day of playing, it's time for some sleepy songs. Listen as Mr. Moon sings a soothing lullaby to help Twinkle drift off to sleep for a peaceful night's rest.

programme.title: E3 - Sky High & Super Fun Adventures
programme.desc: Get ready for sky-high & super fun adventures with JJ & his friends! First, Astronauts JJ & Mimi blast off into space, soaring past stars & planets before landing on the moon for a cheesy snack! When Boba loses his special balloon, the friends set off in a hot air balloon craft for a chase of a lifetime. The action continues as JJ & Wally train to be firefighters, but Wally's goofing around turns him into the one who needs saving!

programme.title: E2 - Calming Star Songs
programme.desc: Little Baby Bum is here to help you fall to sleep; with soothing, relaxing animated lullabies. These gentle and sensory videos are accompanied by lullaby versions of much loved nursery rhymes, helping to take you to the land of nod.

programme.desc: Join Twinkle for some gentle lessons & soothing bedtime songs. First, Twinkle learns about the importance of eating healthy, delicious fruit, like bananas, oranges & grapes. Then, help her find Sandy the Seagull while learning what sounds a pig, duck & cow make! After a long day of learning, it's time to get ready for bed. Listen as Twinkle & Mr. Moon sing a soothing nighttime lullaby to help you relax & drift off to sleep.

programme.desc: Take a journey through the eyes of catfish, ocelots, and other native creatures with narrator Matthew McConaughey. Celebrate the Lone Star State’s landscapes and wildlife, and learn how crucial conservation efforts can save Texas’ unique habitats.

programme.title: The Great Elephant Tale
programme.desc: Follow the adventures of three elephants across three very distinct African habitats. Their travels combine to tell the story of how these emotional and intelligent creatures evolved over millions of years to survive on the continent.

programme.title: Turtle Beach
programme.desc: Locals call it the ‘arribada’, or ‘arrival’. The magical days and nights when tens of thousands of sea turtles come ashore in Costa Rica, to lay millions of eggs.

programme.title: Deep in the Heart
programme.desc: Take a journey through the eyes of catfish, ocelots, and other native creatures with narrator Matthew McConaughey. Celebrate the Lone Star State’s landscapes and wildlife, and learn how crucial conservation efforts can save Texas’ unique habitats.

programme.title: E6 - Masked Bandits
programme.desc: Capture teams from Kenya head to Somali border to capture 50 rare and endangered antelope called a hirola. The hirola numbers have been plummeting over the last decade, and conservation groups know that by capturing and placing them into a protected predator-free conservancy they will rebound.

programme.title: E2 - Rebuilding an Empire
programme.desc: Over the course of recorded time, many species have been threatened with extinction. Once-powerful animal empires – like the dinosaurs - have been completely wiped from the planet. But others once on the verge of disappearance have survived, bounced back, and even reclaimed their kingdoms.

programme.title: How the Wild Things Sleep
programme.desc: Tap into one of the least understood areas of animal science: sleep. Check out adaptations made by the most extreme snoozers on Earth, from tiny bees who doze for 20 hours a day to enormous elephants who survive on just two precious hours of rest.

programme.title: E2 - Return of the Light
programme.desc: Experience the north Atlantic’s intense, brief summer with its animal residents. Follow Arctic fox cubs learning to hunt for survival, an otter pup going solo for the first time, a mate-seeking puffin, and tiny reindeer taking their first steps.

programme.title: E3 - Children of the Storm
programme.desc: In Iceland only one out of six cubs has survived. Abandoned by her parents, she now has to fend for herself. The reindeer herd swim two miles across open water. In Scotland, 35,000 grey seals arrive for their annual breeding season.

programme.title: E1 - Welcome to the Tundra
programme.desc: Wake up post-hibernation with 7 ravenous bears as Stage 1 of the competition kicks off. Battle wolves with new mom BoldFace, see tiny Stomper vie for power and Blondie’s love, and stand back as grizzled vet Bernie brawls with clueless teen Casanova.

programme.title: E2 - Slammin' Salmon
programme.desc: Join the frantic dash to cash in on July’s salmon run with the Stage 1 winners and some tough new recruits. Tag along on BigBoi's food-finding road trip, welcome QuadMom and RedBack to the feast, and see if BoldFace can keep her surviving cub safe.

programme.title: E3 - So Long and Thanks for All the Fish
programme.desc: Bundle up as an icy October storm complicates the race to the finish line. See Big Boi bounce after a stumble before tragedy hits QuadMom, and cheer as fan fave BoldFace hits her stride despite her clingy kid, Raccoon. But who will wear the crown?

programme.title: E6 - Creative Belgitude: A Series Of Talents!
programme.desc: Head for Adventure Valley in Durbuy, transformed for the occasion into a realm of fear. Also Eric-Emmanuel Schmitt, writer and playwright, opens the doors of his chateau in the heart of Hainaut; the Gimber drink; Patrick Syen and his Bentleys; and the Pluriel restaurant.

programme.title: E7 - Beloved Pets
programme.desc: Many pets share the lives of Parisians. They are becoming increasingly important: we love them, we spoil them, we pamper them. In addition to the cat bars that have been around for the past decade in the capital, there are now concept stores, dog festivals and spa hotels.

programme.title: E3 - Auto Retro Bourguebus
programme.desc: Meeting with the Auto Retro Bourguebus association. Laurent then goes to Ryes, to visit a couple of comic book professionals and admire their collector's Renault 4 CV. Michel presents a sporty Peugeot that was long unloved: the 309 GTI.

programme.title: E2 - Long Live Legumes
programme.desc: On the menu: lentils papet vaudois style and crispy chickpeas for the aperitif. Discovery of the day: Geneva longeole cooked on the plancha. Annick Jeanmairet is once again assisted by comedian Brigitte Rosset.

programme.title: E6 - Creative Belgitude: A Series Of Talents!
programme.desc: Head for Adventure Valley in Durbuy, transformed for the occasion into a realm of fear. Also Eric-Emmanuel Schmitt, writer and playwright, opens the doors of his chateau in the heart of Hainaut; the Gimber drink; Patrick Syen and his Bentleys; and the Pluriel restaurant.

programme.title: E2 - The Marriage Of Figaro
programme.desc: A sequel to ''The Barber of Seville'', the opera buffa ''The Marriage of Figaro'', by Wolfgang Amadeus Mozart, was created on 1 May 1786 in Vienna. Extracts of the production staged by Ivan Alexandre in 2022 at the Bordeaux Grand Theatre, conducted by Marc Minkovski.

programme.title: E7 - Beloved Pets

programme.desc: Head for Adventure Valley in Durbuy, transformed for the occasion into a realm of fear. Also Eric-Emmanuel Schmitt, writer and playwright, opens the doors of his chateau in the heart of Hainaut; the Gimber drink; Patrick Syen and his Bentleys; and the Pluriel restaurant.

programme.title: E16 - Semolina Cakes
programme.desc: This week, Leila Albert welcomes Rosine Binder from Alsace who loves her region, into her kitchen. She concocts a traditional recipe that she inherited from her mother: griesknepfle, or semolina cakes, and a savoury gratin with tomato sauce.

programme.title: E18 - Berry, The Heart's Choice
programme.desc: Just two hours from Paris, the Berry is a discreet and little-known land of rural charm and tranquil landscapes. Vast plains, dense forests and peaceful rivers form a simple, authentic picture, far from the hustle and bustle of the big cities, perfect for a revitalising getaway...

programme.title: E2 - The Marriage Of Figaro
programme.desc: A sequel to ''The Barber of Seville'', the opera buffa ''The Marriage of Figaro'', by Wolfgang Amadeus Mozart, was created on 1 May 1786 in Vienna. Extracts of the production staged by Ivan Alexandre in 2022 at the Bordeaux Grand Theatre, conducted by Marc Minkovski.

programme.title: Les Patins
programme.desc: Mina loves skating. Today, her father, recently divorced from her mother, is accompanying her to her first figure skating lesson...

programme.title: Sloth Moths and Their Very Slow Host
programme.desc: For sloths, every day is a bad-hair day. Their matted locks are crawling with life - from parasites, to algae to a colony of sloth moths. Sloths provide a breeding ground for the moths too!

programme.title: The Big Dig
programme.desc: Darwin and Newts go on a big dig adventure to find dinosaur bones.

programme.title: Day of the Birdman
programme.desc: Ricky is reminded of his childhood pet Mr. Chicken. After creating Picasso-inspired art on an egg box, he decides to fly like a bird, making an ingenious collage to help him try to find his old feathered friend.

programme.title: At the Aksum Market
programme.desc: The kingdom of Aksum was a must for traders from all over the world, trading the latest trendy goods and the most luxurious wares. But when Howler comes to do his shopping, he's only got a penny in his pocket and a lot of guile.

programme.title: Plants From the Sea
programme.desc: Kids try sea plants.

programme.title: Do Giants Like Hexagons?
programme.desc: The Giant's Causeway in Northern Ireland is made up of around 40,000 interlocking basalt columns, most of which are hexagonal. Nature is very efficient, so it uses this hexagonal arrangement in many places, such as bubbles and beehives.

programme.title: Acrobat
programme.desc: Draw an acrobat on several faces of a folded paper sheet and unfold it to see their choreography.

programme.title: Higher! Higher!
programme.desc: Doodle Girl learns that her thrill-loving doodles are too much for Liddle Birdie and discovers how to balance fun for everyone at the fair.

programme.title: Growing Bones
programme.desc: Scientists are developing tools for bone regeneration that could lead to the development of new regenerative therapies. In this episode we travel to Wurzburg in Germany where we meet patients in urgent need of bone implants.

programme.title: A New Boy in Town
programme.desc: The ice-dancing girls are desperate for boy partners, and new boy Adriano is moving from Italy to Nottingham to find himself a dance partner. Nine-year-old Charlie lives and breathes ice hockey, but has he got what it takes to impress the coach?

programme.title: Eye Popping
programme.desc: In this episode, the kitchen lab has been turned upside down as Dr. Xand gives the optic nerves of the world the day off. And find out how to make your own eye-popping, brain-teasing game.

Phoenix Intercontinental Express is a current affairs program airing at midnight that brings people news from Greater China and around the world.

programme.title: E506
programme.desc: HONG KONG PERSPECTIVES: Hong Kong Perspectives is a Cantonese-language programme. Through interviewing people from different walks of life and key figures in major events, the programme provides viewers with an in-depth understanding of Hong Kong. Staying close to public sentiment and targeting hot topics of social concern, it dissects Hong Kong's current affairs and future prospects from political, economic, livelihood, and cultural perspectives, examining them with varying degrees of depth and perspective.

programme.title: E475
programme.desc: CULTURAL CANVAS: Cultural Canvas is a flagship cultural program of Phoenix TV deeply beloved by young audiences as their window to engage with and understand traditional culture. Blending 'high culture with popular culture,' the program explores both tangible artifacts and intangible cultural heritage. It tackles major cultural topics with expansive perspectives, interpreting everyday cultural phenomena.

programme.title: E146
programme.desc: Through the captivating stories presented in We Are One, the viewers can fully immerse themselves in the narratives and witness the genuine emotions that arise between humans and animals. These emotions are rooted in love and go beyond mere boundaries, showcasing the remarkable power of love in forging meaningful connections.
PHOENIX MIDDAY EXPRESS: Presenting the most update international and financial news breaking before lunch, viewers can turn it to stay informed about events happening around the world.

programme.title: E388
programme.desc: PHOENIX SUPER DOCTORS: Phoenix Super Doctors is a cross-media health science popularization program. It precisely targets core audiences aged 25-65, including business leaders, middle-class, white-collar workers and highly educated individuals. Centered on trending health topics, the program integrates the wisdom of traditional Chinese medicine with cutting-edge achievements in modern Western medicine. Featuring a top-tier expert team led by academicians, it delivers an immersive, virtual-real blended audiovisual experience through XR virtual scenarios and AI-powered intelligent graphics.

Our Memory - A Phenomenal Storage System
programme.desc: Our memory is a machine of superlatives. Every second, it processes unimaginable amounts of information, decides what's important and what's not, and stores what we experience and learn.

programme.title: Understand The World, One Story At A Time
programme.desc: Our deep dive format explains the stories that matter - with clarity, context and journalistic rigor. Each segment goes beyond the headlines to uncover what's driving key developments around the world, featuring sharp analysis, expert voices and exclusive on the ground insights from where events are unfolding.

programme.title: Last Refuge From Deportation - Church Asylum Under Scrutiny
programme.desc: For more than 40 years, German churches have been offering refugees church asylum. But this is not a legal right. And the practice is increasingly being called into question by German authorities.

programme.title: Our Memory - A Phenomenal Storage System

programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE delivers the latest from Japan, Asia, and the rest of the world. programme.desc: In search of her grandfather's secret life as a Force 136 operative, Xin En turns to LiDAR technology to uncover what history has hidden. Each discovery reveals espionage, sacrifice and blurred morality.

programme.desc: Kingo dives WWII wrecks globally and Lilian photographs tiny sea creatures in Bali, each venturing to depths most never see. Together, they reveal a hidden underwater world shaped by their obsession.

programme.title: E38 - : How Safe Is Aluminium Foil? (Eng Subs)
programme.desc: Aluminium foil is a kitchen staple. But with concerns about metal leaching, how safe is foil for cooking? Diana Ser conducts a test to find out how much aluminium is leaching into our food.

programme.title: Bs Special 'Beyond The Deep River, The Magpie Bridge'
programme.desc: 'Ink painting is the poetry of the heart.' Fu Yiyao, a sumi-e artist whose father was a master of Chinese ink painting, has worked in Japan for 46 years since moving there at 32, living between two countries through times of change. Her art is shaped by sorrow and hardship, a dialogue with nature, and journeys tracing great predecessors. In an age of growing global division, how does she face the world as an artist? This documentary follows her as she challenges a major work that marks the culmination of her career.

programme.title: With Father
programme.desc: A children's program comprised of fun stories, songs as well as gymnastic exercises which can be enjoyed together with fathers.

programme.title: The Visualization Entertainment: Go! Kaneo-Kun
programme.desc: The show is MC-ed by comedian Ariyoshi Hiroiki, who hosts an NHK program on a regular basis for the first time. The mascot character 'Kaneo-kun' (voice of Nobu, of comedy duo Chidori), who loves money, visits various places, including popular visiting locations, and looks into different phenomena to learn how money plays a role. The undertaking help unravel unexpected trends in society. The program, which can be enjoyed by every member of the family, offers much food for thought.

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: An original sci-fi drama based on Ogawa Satoshi's novel, scripted by Yoshida Reiko. In 2125, Mars hosts 100,000 settlers under ISDA's control, as tension brews between authority and freedom. Lili-E1102 (Suri Lin), a visually impaired woman born on Mars, endures harsh training to reach Earth-for one reason: to meet Shiraishi Aoto (Suda Masaki), a young ISDA officer, and honor a secret promise. But when a catastrophic event derails her mission, it sparks a chain of schemes between Mars and Earth-leading to consequences far greater than anyone imagined.

programme.title: Bs Special 'Beyond The Deep River, The Magpie Bridge'
programme.desc: 'Ink painting is the poetry of the heart.' Fu Yiyao, a sumi-e artist whose father was a master of Chinese ink painting, has worked in Japan for 46 years since moving there at 32, living between two countries through times of change. Her art is shaped by sorrow and hardship, a dialogue with nature, and journeys tracing great predecessors. In an age of growing global division, how does she face the world as an artist? This documentary follows her as she challenges a major work that marks the culmination of her career.

programme.desc: SpongeBob meets a magical fish. // SpongeBob cooks in the big leagues.

programme.title: E101 - Jade the Juggler
programme.desc: Jade tries to help too many people and ends up causing chaos in the process!

programme.title: E526 - Captain Mom
programme.desc: Captain Man is being a baby about having a baby. Labor pains leave him helpless so Kid Danger and Piper step up to take on a couple of slick grease thieves.

programme.title: E212 - iMeet Fred
programme.desc: Freddie says on the air that he is not a fan of internet sensation Fred, causing Fred to announce the end of his videos forever. Fans are infuriated that Freddie has caused an end to the popular videos.

programme.title: E192 - Company Picnic / Pull Up a Barrel
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs throws a company picnic to boost morale, but Plankton is hosting his own on the same day! // Mr. Krabs regales SpongeBob with tales from his old Navy days.

programme.title: E105 - Save the Date
programme.desc: Max bets Phoebe she can't turn off being a superhero and go on a normal date. Chloe helps Phoebe do well on the date, but Max tries to sabotage it by crying wolf. Suddenly, a real supervillain emerges and puts Max and Chloe in serious danger.

programme.title: E117 - Twin It to Win It
programme.desc: Captain Man makes twin superheroes, ShoutOut and AWOL, compete over who can catch more criminals using their own ways of crime-fighting.

programme.title: E609 - The Last Laugh / Driver's Dread
programme.desc: Luan thinks Mr. Coconuts is out for revenge when she replaces him with Lola in her act. // Hoping to drive out to the outlets to meet Lori, Leni ooks for alternative ways to get her driver's license.

programme.title: E243 - The Nitwitting / The Ballad of Filthy Muck
programme.desc: Patrick inducts SpongeBob into his prestigious society of dullards and doofuses. // Patrick takes his grime to a new extreme, playing around in so much trash that he becomes unrecognizable.

programme.title: E209 - She's All Splat
programme.desc: With Cherry working at Splat by Sea, Max ropes her into a fake dating scheme to score partner discounts at the restaurant. Chloe faces a tough choice between winning a trivia competition or supporting her brother Billy when he wants to join her team.

programme.title: E205 - Lay Lay Gets a Pet Pet
programme.desc: When Lay Lay and Sadie see Cobo with a cool pet snake, they decide it's time for the Alexander family to adopt a unique pet of their own. Lay Lay discovers the perfect furry companion: a wild possum she discovers she's allergic to!

programme.title: E109 - Party Party / Mica's Robot
programme.desc: Thinking she hasn't been invited to Bibi's party Jade sneaks in. // Mica doesn't finish his robot in time for the school science fair, so the Marsupilamis squeeze inside and operate it.

programme.title: E1003 - Spy Dames / Cupid's Harrow
programme.desc: During Grandparent's Day at Lincoln's school, he and Myrtle face off with a spy nemesis from Myrtle's past. // Leni accidentally causes trouble for Lori and Bobby while taking calls on her and Miguel's dating podcast.

programme.title: Ici l'Europe : on en débat

programme.title: Légendes urbaines
programme.desc: Un moment dédié pour donner la parole aux grands acteurs des cultures urbaines mondiales. Ils sont les têtes d'affiches des genres musicaux les plus écoutés aujourd'hui mais sont parfois méconnus du grand public. Une découverte de la face cachée' de ces artistes, derrière les clichés, les postures, et loin de l'actualité promotionnelle.'

programme.title: Les observateurs
programme.desc: Une émission réalisée à partir de contenus amateurs : photos ou vidéos, tout vient des observateurs du monde entier. Les contenus sont vérifiés par la rédaction de la chaîne.

programme.title: La semaine de l'éco
programme.desc: Stéphanie Antoine, accompagnée de ses invités, analyse et décrypte les principaux faits de l'actualité économique internationale de la semaine. Ensemble, ils apportent un éclairage sur les tendances, les enjeux et les dynamiques qui influencent l'économie mondiale.

programme.title: ENTR
programme.desc: Un projet 100% numérique et accessible sur tous les réseaux sociaux, qui brasse des thèmes à destination des jeunes Européens.

programme.title: Le journal - L'invité au coeur de l'info[Live]
programme.desc: Une interview au format long avec une personnalité influente du monde politique, culturel, scientifique ou humanitaire, offrant une plongée approfondie au cœur de l'actualité internationale. À travers ses analyses et son expérience, elle apporte un éclairage unique sur les grands enjeux de notre époque.

programme.title: Le décryptage[Live]
programme.desc: L'analyse approfondie d'un fait d'actualité qui revient sur un événement marquant ou une thématique complexe pour en expliquer les enjeux, les causes et les conséquences.

programme.title: L'essentiel : le journal[Live]
programme.desc: L'essentiel de l'actualité : un grand journal couvrant politique, économie et sport, enrichi de décryptages clairs et d'analyses approfondies des événements majeurs. Un rendez-vous pour s'informer efficacement et mieux comprendre le monde d'aujourd'hui.

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: The journey heads towards the picturesque water city of Chuncheon. Nam-gil and Sang-yoon meet a travelling doctor who works in remote villages without medical facilities and join him on his rounds.

programme.title: The Venice Murders
programme.desc: Leaving her career behind, Celia follows her passion to Italy but faces crisis when her roommate vanishes. Alone, she joins eccentric Aunt Rosato to rescue her friend and unmask the abductor.

programme.title: E3 - Holiday Lasagne
programme.desc: What is red, white and green all over? It's Rachael Ray's lasagne! Rachael shows how to make delicious lasagne by layering sheets of pasta with cime di rapa, ricotta and a ragu sauce.

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: The journey heads towards the picturesque water city of Chuncheon. Nam-gil and Sang-yoon meet a travelling doctor who works in remote villages without medical facilities and join him on his rounds.

programme.title: E8
programme.desc: From Seoul to Busan, this spectacular eating show takes place at famous bakeries/patisseries to give the dessert lovers the glimpse of tasty goodness of some of the most-coveted desserts of all.

programme.title: E29
programme.desc: On the final night in Australia, the Dokbakz reach their accommodation. But things take a strange turn when something mysterious appears in the front yard, causing the group to jump in fright.

programme.title: Crowdsource Murder
programme.desc: Monica starts a crowdsource fund to pay for the hospital bills after her daughter is injured. But as a seemingly attractive and generous man donates more and more money, she begins to question his motives.

programme.desc: From Seoul to Busan, this spectacular eating show takes place at famous bakeries/patisseries to give the dessert lovers the glimpse of tasty goodness of some of the most-coveted desserts of all.

programme.title: CNBC Meets
programme.desc: Hosted by Tania Bryer, “CNBC Meets” is an intimate interview series that takes viewers inside the lives and legacies of trailblazers across business, entertainment, sport and politics. Each episode offers rare access to their homes, offices and empires - uncovering the ambitions, challenges and entrepreneurial mindsets that shaped their success and continue to drive them forward.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: “American Greed” goes inside the dark side of the American Dream - where money seduces, power corrupts, and smooth criminals will stop at nothing to get rich.

programme.title: Late Night With Seth Meyers
programme.desc: Emmy Award-nominated “Late Night with Seth Meyers,” hosted by award-winning writer and performer Seth Meyers, is home to incisive humor, topical jokes and A-list celebrity guests. The series' signature “A Closer Look” segment has garnered millions of views and is widely lauded for its tightly written and thoughtful approach to analyzing and satirizing news of the day.

programme.title: Late Night With Seth Meyers
programme.desc: Emmy Award-nominated “Late Night with Seth Meyers,” hosted by award-winning writer and performer Seth Meyers, is home to incisive humor, topical jokes and A-list celebrity guests. The series' signature “A Closer Look” segment has garnered millions of views and is widely lauded for its tightly written and thoughtful approach to analyzing and satirizing news of the day.

programme.title: Executive Decisions
programme.desc: ‘Executive Decisions' is a CNBC podcast offering a rare window into the minds of top decision-makers. Hosted by Steve Sedgwick, each episode explores the pivotal choices that shape the careers and legacies of business leaders and policymakers. Through candid conversations about risk, doubt and conviction, the series reminds us that even the most powerful face uncertainty and trade-offs.

programme.title: CNBC On Assignment
programme.desc: CNBC goes on assignment at the biggest events around the world, bringing you interviews and insight from the most influential leaders in business, politics, activism and the arts.

programme.desc: “American Greed” goes inside the dark side of the American Dream - where money seduces, power corrupts, and smooth criminals will stop at nothing to get rich.

programme.title: CNBC Meets
programme.desc: Hosted by Tania Bryer, “CNBC Meets” is an intimate interview series that takes viewers inside the lives and legacies of trailblazers across business, entertainment, sport and politics. Each episode offers rare access to their homes, offices and empires - uncovering the ambitions, challenges and entrepreneurial mindsets that shaped their success and continue to drive them forward.

programme.title: Executive Decisions
programme.desc: ‘Executive Decisions' is a CNBC podcast offering a rare window into the minds of top decision-makers. Hosted by Steve Sedgwick, each episode explores the pivotal choices that shape the careers and legacies of business leaders and policymakers. Through candid conversations about risk, doubt and conviction, the series reminds us that even the most powerful face uncertainty and trade-offs.

programme.title: Late Night With Seth Meyers
programme.desc: Emmy Award-nominated “Late Night with Seth Meyers,” hosted by award-winning writer and performer Seth Meyers, is home to incisive humor, topical jokes and A-list celebrity guests. programme.title: E1
programme.desc: 故事以夏日的相遇為主題，在海邊一起出生及長大的「海邊的灰姑娘」女子三人組與在東京就讀一流大學的優等生男子們相識的故事。在盛夏的海邊出現命運般的相遇，各人一起努力跨越看不見的差異，帶著複雜交錯的感情，相互交織想法一起成長。

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: 鷹野爪子是一名外表聰明幹練、聲音沉穩的女子。她充滿自信，同時謙遜有禮，充滿王牌風範。雖然看似能幹，但其實非常無能。另一方面，鷹野的同期鶸田道人則是和爪子完全相反，是個外表看似無能實則十分能幹的可憐上班族。這樣的他，卻被迫成為在公司內部終日無所事事的鷹野的搭檔，開始了極其不幸的職場生活。

programme.title: E23
programme.desc: 本劇講述二戰期間1942-1945年澳門「孤島」時期的抗戰風雲故事。 1941年12月香港淪陷後，澳葡政府名為“中立”，實則任由日軍澤榮作特務機關橫行霸道。愛國華人何賢、馬萬祺以及中共地下黨柯麟等人以強烈的愛國心與責任感團結同胞，凝聚澳門華人社團力量奮力反抗。

programme.title: E12
programme.desc: 痴迷於數學的帥家默偶然發現金華縣一個歷史遺留問題，他在試圖糾正錯誤的過程中頻頻遇阻，並引發了各利益集團間的博弈。 軍戶出身的帥家默對數學極其感興趣，在一次拿各縣賦稅練習數學時，偶然發現有一筆科目叫作“人丁絲絹”稅收數目有疑點。經過查詢，帥家默知道有人偷換概念、移花接木，把原本各縣的賦稅轉嫁給了一個縣。帥家默瞭解此事後決定申訴，但在申訴過程中遇到重重困難，險些喪命，“人丁絲絹案”就此擱淺。後遇改革，舊案重提，經過帥家默和各方努力才讓真相大白於天下。

programme.title: E22
programme.desc: 本劇講述二戰期間1942-1945年澳門「孤島」時期的抗戰風雲故事。 1941年12月香港淪陷後，澳葡政府名為“中立”，實則任由日軍澤榮作特務機關橫行霸道。愛國華人何賢、馬萬祺以及中共地下黨柯麟等人以強烈的愛國心與責任感團結同胞，凝聚澳門華人社團力量奮力反抗。

programme.title: E40
programme.desc: 先天二年夏秋之交，天子雖已登基，但大長公主勢力更盛，長安局勢陰晴難定。盧凌風和蘇無名，奉命帶著由裴喜君、費雞師、櫻桃和薛環組成的探案小隊，以護送康國所獻金桃的名義重返長安。

programme.title: E12
programme.desc: 痴迷於數學的帥家默偶然發現金華縣一個歷史遺留問題，他在試圖糾正錯誤的過程中頻頻遇阻，並引發了各利益集團間的博弈。 軍戶出身的帥家默對數學極其感興趣，在一次拿各縣賦稅練習數學時，偶然發現有一筆科目叫作“人丁絲絹”稅收數目有疑點。經過查詢，帥家默知道有人偷換概念、移花接木，把原本各縣的賦稅轉嫁給了一個縣。帥家默瞭解此事後決定申訴，但在申訴過程中遇到重重困難，險些喪命，“人丁絲絹案”就此擱淺。後遇改革，舊案重提，經過帥家默和各方努力才讓真相大白於天下。

programme.title: E24
programme.desc: 本劇講述二戰期間1942-1945年澳門「孤島」時期的抗戰風雲故事。 1941年12月香港淪陷後，澳葡政府名為“中立”，實則任由日軍澤榮作特務機關橫行霸道。愛國華人何賢、馬萬祺以及中共地下黨柯麟等人以強烈的愛國心與責任感團結同胞，凝聚澳門華人社團力量奮力反抗。

programme.title: E11
programme.desc: A 30-year-old woman suddenly has a new father who is three years younger than her. With time, she accepts him as a family; he always takes her side and loves her unconditionally. What would happen to them?

programme.title: E7
programme.desc: Age is just a number-attraction is pure instinct. Charismatic “Noonas” (older women) who have long put love on hold to pursue their careers meet younger men who fearlessly follow their hearts, sparking emotionally driven romances. Breaking through the real-world barriers of age differences, this bold and candid reality series follows older-woman–younger-man couples as they explore love with honesty and courage. As their relationships unfold, long-dormant romantic instincts are awakened in this refreshingly daring dating reality show.

programme.desc: Follow the latest trend in the Korean music scene through the K-chart, a summary of the week's hottest songs.

programme.desc: A groundbreaking 30-minute interview show, giving an in-depth look into how top companies around the world conduct business and how policymakers view the fast-changing world economy. programme.title: E4 - Aria Of The Land And The Night Sky
programme.desc: Allen is attacked by a level 2 Akuma that can imitate anybody. They learn that the ghost of Martel is not a ghost, but a moving and singing doll.

programme.title: E5 - Let Me Hear The Lullaby
programme.desc: Conflict rises between Allen and Kanda after learning the truth about the ghost. Pierrot attacks Allen and the two engage in final battle.

programme.title: E1 - Marie And Shion
programme.desc: Shion is disappointed that magic doesn't exist. One day, his sister takes him to a lake after witnessing a phenomenon.

programme.title: E21 - The Heroes Fight Bravely
programme.desc: Tomoe and Mio lead their forces to reclaim their homeland, Kaleneon. Meanwhile, in the Gritonia Empire, the powerful adventurer Sophia, allied with demons, confronts Tomoki.

programme.title: E52 - Unexpected Relanding! Luffy, To Marineford!
programme.desc: Brannew briefs Marineford HQ on Luffy's stunt days ago when he appeared there with Rayleigh and Jimbei.

programme.title: E53 - With Hopes It Will Reach My Friends! Big News Spreading Fast!
programme.desc: Luffy's return to Marineford spreads worldwide. Buggy, Vivi, and Crocodile watch in confusion. Duval guards the Sunny.

programme.desc: It is the beginning of the summer break. Arisa has a new admirer from the convenience store that she works at.

programme.title: Emergency Declaration
programme.desc: Veteran chief police detective In-ho (SONG Kang-ho) receives a tip about a man threatening a terrorist attack against a plane. While investigating, he discovers that the suspect has actually boarded flight no. KI501. Despite his phobia of flying, Jae-hyuk (LEE Byung-hun) decides to go to Hawaii for the sake for his daughter's health. At the airport, he is distracted by a strange man who hangs around, speaking to them in a menacing way. Flight no. KI501 departs Incheon Airport for Hawaii, but soon afterwards a man dies for mysterious reasons. Fear and chaos spread quickly, not only inside the plane, but also on land. Hearing this news, Transport Minister Sook-hee (JEON Do-yeon) sets up a counterterrorism task force and calls an emergency meeting in order to find a way to land the airplane.

programme.title: The Last Tycoon
programme.desc: It was 1917, China. CHENG was an innocent young man who worked in a grocery store and had no ambition, other than to be with his lovely neighbour, the Peking Opera student QIU. But a fateful night had changed Cheng's life forever, as he literally walked right in the affair between his lady boss and the chief of police. To hide this secret, the chief decided to throw Cheng into prison, accusing him of raping his lady boss. Desolated, Cheng met a cellmate MAO, who happened to have an escape plan. The duo broke out, and Cheng had no choice but to leave his life, and his dream girl behind...

programme.title: The Monkey King 3
programme.desc: On the conflict-packed journey to the West for the scriptures, escorted by Sun, Bajie and Sha, Xuanzang, the Tang Priest, accidentally enters the Womanland of Western Liang, a mysterious nation where no men has ever been existed. The Queen falls for Xuanzang at first sight, without knowing what love is, thinking she could be terminally ill with incurable lovesickness. The Preceptor warns her that men are all poisonous creatures and orders to kill Xuanzang and his disciples. With the help of the Queen, the four flee the execution site, but later Xuanzang, Bajie and Sha carelessly drink the water from the Motherhood River that makes them pregnant rapidly. Wukong tries to save the three with his almighty transforming sorcery, when Xuanzang gradually loses his stand to falls in love with the Queen. programme.title: First Option
programme.desc: Wong and his team are forced to team up with a bungling customs squad and their greenhorn leader, who happens to be a woman, to bring in a huge shipment of heroine...

programme.title: Once Upon A Time In China II
programme.desc: During his stay in Canton, Wong Fei Hung meets Sun Yat Sun and Luke. He decides to help them escape by the 'cover' from the rioting White Lotus Sect.

programme.title: Final Justice
programme.desc: Cheung Tit-hong has recorded numerous meritorious deeds, but he is by nature uncontrollable and antagonistic to his bureaucratic superiors. Before reporting his work to his superiors, he has already successfully arrested the gangsters who steal motorbikes. He also saved an innocent teacher from being wrongly accused of theft by recognizing a female pickpocket. Finally, he has subdued fierce armed robbers in the gambling casino by flexibly utilizing a car thief, Boy. The contradictions in working style between Cheung and his superiors naturally lead to numerous scenes of strong conflicts...

programme.title: The Movie Star Says -Sandra Ng
programme.desc: Known as the 'Queen of Comedy', Sandra Ng as an actress has spanned across generations, allowing her to witness the ups and downs of Hong Kong films over decades. Looking back onto the golden age of Hong Kong cinema, Ng confessed that comedies in the old days were much more simple and straight forward. Stepping into the millennium, recession in film industry somehow inspired her to produce own masterpieces of the era. With her youth dedicated to the Hong Kong cinema, how does she feel about lifelong career as an actress, a director and a producer?

programme.title: You're OK, I'm OK
programme.desc: Twenty-five year old Liang Shao Chiang leads a boring life working as an auditor in a big finance corporation. He only has eyes for the receptionist Chow Yun-Lan. Chow is young and pretty, and is the natural target for the bunch of horny men around her. But she is pert and secretive, and no one is able to get even a date from her. Liang has fallen deeper and deeper for Chow. Alas this love is not reciprocative. But suddenly there is a breakthrough in his career, for four managers of the company is recommending a promotion for him! Of course, there is a price behind this - Liang has to let them use his bachelor apartment for conducting love affairs! Soon this scandal travels to the ears of the general manager Mr. Lui...

programme.title: Stunning Gigi Lai: United We Stand
programme.desc: Alias “Springing Gazelle”, the renowned athlete Miss Chi Cheng is in Hong Kong helping to organize a training programme and hunt for a coach. Olivia was a former brilliant sprinter who has to give up running after her injury in a competition. At the beginning of the training, the girls are too pompous that they despise Olivia, until they find that Olivia is beyond their challenge, they adore her and are willing to go through the hardship but after a winning contest, they feel hostility towards each other and behave proudly. As a result, they lost in the competition with Singapore team. Olivia is so furious...
